name: Salt Analysis Test
description: Verification of multi-scene execution logic in the pipeline.
subject: Chemistry
educational_goal: Demonstrate transitioning between two different laboratory scene setups in one pipeline execution.

scene.scene: A close-up shot of a glass test tube held by a metallic holder containing dry white salt powder.
scene.camera: Fixed, close-up centered on test tube

prompt_bundle.image_prompt: A clean photo of a glass test tube held by a metallic holder containing white salt powder, neutral grey background.
prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: A burner flame heats the bottom of the test tube, white powder is dry and still.

scene.scene: The same glass test tube held by the holder.
scene.camera: Fixed, close-up centered on test tube

prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: Crackle sounds can be heard as white gas begins to slowly evolve from the heating powder.

scene.scene: A clean platinum wire loop dipped in salt paste held in a hot blue Bunsen burner flame.
scene.camera: Fixed macro view of wire loop and flame
scene.lighting: Dim lab ambient lighting to emphasize flame color

prompt_bundle.image_prompt: A detailed macro photo of a clean platinum wire loop held in a hot blue Bunsen burner flame, neutral dark background.
prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: The flame changes color to a brilliant crimson red flame color as the salt vaporizes.
